issues.title: Incorrect failure rate calculation
issues.line: ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 2) as failure_rate_pct
issues.problem: The failure rate calculation is incorrect because it uses COUNT(*) which includes all transactions, not just COMPLETED ones.
issues.fix: ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) as failure_rate_pct

issues.title: Lack of comments
issues.problem: The query lacks comments explaining the logic, which makes it harder to understand for other developers.
issues.fix: Add comments explaining the purpose of each part of the query.

review.corrected_sql:
-- Sample Query 2: Transaction failure rate by payment method
SELECT 
    payment_method,
    COUNT(*) as total_transactions,
    SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as failed_count,
    ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'FAILED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'COMPLETED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 2) as failure_rate_pct
FROM fact_transactions
GROUP BY payment_method
ORDER BY failure_rate_pct DESC;
review.summary: The query has a correctness issue with the failure rate calculation and lacks comments for readability.
